build_system.build_command: mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake -C ../cmake/presets/most.cmake -C ../cmake/presets/nolib.cmake -D PKG_GPU=off ../cmake && cmake --build . -j4

configuration_parameters.description: Working directory that contains the staged input script and `water_216_data.lmp`. This matters because the input script uses `read_data water_216_data.lmp` as a relative path.
configuration_parameters.name: goal_input_root

configuration_parameters.description: LAMMPS input script passed to `lmp -in ...`; it sets run length, thermo cadence, and all runtime controls for the workload.
configuration_parameters.name: input_script

configuration_parameters.description: LAMMPS data file read by the workload input before replication. It defines the seed 216-water box, masses, charges, topology, and intramolecular coefficients.
configuration_parameters.name: data_file

configuration_parameters.description: MPI rank count used to launch `lmp`. The target workload spectrum uses 16, 32, and 64 ranks.
configuration_parameters.name: mpi_ranks

configuration_parameters.description: Simulation unit system from the workload input.
configuration_parameters.name: units

configuration_parameters.description: LAMMPS atom style required by the workload data file.
configuration_parameters.name: atom_style

configuration_parameters.description: TIP4P long-range nonbonded model used by the workload.
configuration_parameters.name: pair_style

configuration_parameters.description: Bond style in scope, registered by `BondStyle(class2,BondClass2)`.
configuration_parameters.name: bond_style

configuration_parameters.description: Angle style in scope, registered by `AngleStyle(harmonic,AngleHarmonic)`.
configuration_parameters.name: angle_style

configuration_parameters.description: Per-type class2 bond coefficients from `water_216_data.lmp`: `r0 k2 k3 k4`.
configuration_parameters.name: bond_coeffs

configuration_parameters.description: Per-type harmonic angle coefficients from `water_216_data.lmp`: `k theta0_degrees`.
configuration_parameters.name: angle_coeffs

configuration_parameters.description: Replication factors applied after `read_data`. The 216-water seed box is replicated to the benchmark system.
configuration_parameters.name: replicate

configuration_parameters.description: Deterministic seed used by `velocity all create` in both target input scripts.
configuration_parameters.name: velocity_seed

configuration_parameters.description: Long-range electrostatics style used after bonded forces.
configuration_parameters.name: kspace_style

configuration_parameters.description: Integrator timestep from the workload input.
configuration_parameters.name: timestep

configuration_parameters.description: Thermo fields emitted by the workload input and used for correctness comparisons.
configuration_parameters.example: custom step atoms temp etotal pe ke press density
configuration_parameters.name: thermo_style

configuration_parameters.description: Total MD steps requested by the input script.
configuration_parameters.name: run_steps

entry_points.description: MPI CLI entry point for the `lmp` executable. It initializes MPI, constructs `LAMMPS(argc, argv, communicator)`, and executes the active input script through `lammps->input->file()`.
entry_points.name: main

entry_points.description: Primary timestep loop for `run_style verlet`. Each step performs integration, neighbor/ghost communication or rebuild, pair force computation, bonded force computation, PPPM/kspace, reverse communication, and output. The standard `Bond` timer bucket is stamped after bond+angle+dihedral+improper work.
entry_points.name: Verlet::run

entry_points.description: Hot bonded kernel for `bond_style class2`. It walks `neighbor->bondlist` entries `[i1,i2,type]`, computes `r`, `dr = r - r0[type]`, evaluates the class2 polynomial and derivative, updates `atom->f`, and tallies energy/virial via `ev_tally()` when requested.
entry_points.name: BondClass2::compute

entry_points.description: Hot bonded kernel for `angle_style harmonic`. It walks `neighbor->anglelist` entries `[i1,i2,i3,type]`, computes the two bond vectors and geometry, clamps cosine into `[-1,1]`, uses `acos(c)` and a guarded `1/sin(theta)` path, updates `atom->f`, and tallies energy/virial.
entry_points.name: AngleHarmonic::compute

entry_points.call_signature: double BondClass2::single(int type, double rsq, int i, int j, double &fforce)
entry_points.description: Single-interaction API for one class2 bond. Existing unit tests use it to cross-check style-level energy/force consistency against the bulk `compute()` path.
entry_points.name: BondClass2::single

entry_points.call_signature: double AngleHarmonic::single(int type, int i1, int i2, int i3)
entry_points.description: Single-interaction API for one harmonic angle. Existing unit tests use it as a reference-style evaluator outside the full neighbor-list loop.
entry_points.name: AngleHarmonic::single

immutable_paths: all repository paths outside the goal editable scope

output_quantities.description: Total energy from `thermo_style custom step atoms temp etotal pe ke press density` at matched output steps.
Derived NVE drift metric computed from sampled total energy over the longer runs.
Potential energy from thermo output at matched output steps.
Kinetic energy from thermo output at matched output steps.
Temperature from thermo output at matched output steps.
Pressure from thermo output at matched output steps.
Density from thermo output. For this fixed-volume replicated water deck it should remain effectively invariant.
Per-atom force components on representative frames. Compare both RMS and max absolute deltas versus the incumbent baseline.
Optional direct bond-only energy from `compute pe/atom bond` plus `compute reduce sum`, matching the style-level unit-test pattern.
Optional direct angle-only energy from `compute pe/atom angle` plus `compute reduce sum`, matching the style-level unit-test pattern.

suggested_cases.description: Short pure-MPI training case on 16 ranks. This is the cleanest place to resolve bonded time against the full loop.
Short pure-MPI training case on 32 ranks to preserve usefulness across a second domain decomposition.
Longer-horizon NVE drift and timer-stability training case on 16 ranks.
Held-out long validation case on 32 ranks.
Held-out scaling-sensitive short case on 64 ranks. Useful for regression detection, but it should not define the optimization direction.

threading_model.description: LAMMPS is an MPI program by default when CMake finds MPI (`BUILD_MPI=ON`), otherwise it links MPI stubs. The provided build preset enables the OPENMP package, and unit tests can switch to `/omp` style variants with `-pk omp N -sf omp`, but the goal input explicitly names the base styles `class2` and `harmonic`. For this optimization campaign, the intended mode is pure MPI with `OMP_NUM_THREADS=1`, fixed rank count per case, and no `-sf omp`, so the executable runs the base kernels in `src/CLASS2/bond_class2.cpp` and `src/MOLECULE/angle_harmonic.cpp`.
